attempted_actions.description: Run full test suite against implementation artifacts
Check lint compliance across all changed files

drift_analysis.description: No drift detected between spec requirements and implementation.

risk_flags.description: One acceptance criterion is verified by a single unit test only.
risk_flags.mitigation: Add an integration test covering the same criterion in the next phase.

decisions.description: Proceed to review without additional verification loops.
decisions.rationale: All tests pass and drift delta is zero.
alternatives_considered: Run a second verification loop with stricter coverage thresholds

verdict_recommendation.reasoning: All quality metrics are within acceptable thresholds and no high-severity risks were identified.
